title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 547.010 - New trials
text:
547.010.  New trials. — Verdicts may be set aside, and new trials awarded on the application of the defendant.  A new trial is a reexamination of the issue in the same court; the former verdict shall not be used or referred to on the subsequent trial, either in the evidence or argument.
(RSMo 1939 § 4123) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3733; 1919 § 4077; 1909 § 5283
